title: Mid A2 — Health & doctor visits
summary: Describe symptoms, talk with a GP or pharmacy, make appointments, and follow simple instructions (moeten/mogen) — calm, practical Dutch.
objectives_can_do: Name common symptoms and say how long you have felt unwell
Follow a short doctor or pharmacy conversation and ask for repetition
Make or change a simple appointment by phone or message
Understand basic medicine instructions (how often, before/after food)
Use moeten/mogen/kunnen in short advice sentences
Stay polite and clear under mild stress at spreekuur
integration_scripts_summary: GP intake, pharmacy pickup, appointment desk — aligned to Stage 6 schema module a2-m06-health-doctor (eleven lessons).
grammar_focus: symptom patterns: ik heb … / ik voel me … / het doet pijn
doctor questions: sinds wanneer, hoe lang al, waar
light perfectum: slecht geslapen, koorts gehad
modals in advice: u moet, u mag, u kunt
clarifying: kunt u herhalen, langzamer praten, ik begrijp het niet
